title: Eric Ries on Organizations: 'Metabolizing the Outside World Into Themselves'
summary: Eric points readers to Benedict Evans's classic essay 'The Amazon Machine' as essential reading for understanding what organizations are and how they grow.
blockquote:
If you want to understand what organizations are, how they grow by metabolizing the outside world into themselves, and why they make people feel queasy sometimes, you need to read an old essay by Benedict Evans called The Amazon Machine:  https://lnkd.in/gZbhreHX

"Amazon, then, is a machine to make a machine - it is a machine to make more Amazon."
